name: Recall Headquarters
text:
{T}: Add {C}.
{T}: Add {G} or {W}. Activate only if a Voter, recall, or signature is mentioned on a permanent you control.
{3}, {T}: You gain 1 life for each Voter you control. (The HQ tallies the whole movement and feels great about it.)
flavorText: A rented storefront with a hand-lettered sign, forty folding chairs, and a coffee maker that has seen things.
